summary: KOLO Phase 1 (Super Admin space + Google/Apple Sign-In buttons) fully tested. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed covering /api/admin/check, /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/leads (list + filter + PATCH with 400/404), /api/admin/users (search + status filter), and /api/auth/me is_super_admin flag for both admin and non-admin tokens. Frontend: All 9 critical UI flows passed - social buttons on /login and /register (Google enabled, Apple disabled with 'Bientôt disponible' tooltip), Google click correctly redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<encoded_origin>, /kolo-admin unauthenticated redirects to /login, super-admin dashboard renders with data-testid='kolo-admin-dashboard', all 4 stat cards visible, leads list + filters + PATCH status update persists end-to-end, users list + search by 'elliot' correctly returns admin row.

issues: React hydration console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' and '<tr> ... span'. The Active/Trial pills in the users table are wrapped in a <span> that ends up directly under <tbody> instead of inside a <td>. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.js around the users table render.

action_items: Fix minor React hydration warning in AdminDashboard users table (<span> as direct child of <tbody>/<tr>). Likely a stray <span> outside the <td>s in the row mapping.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 5400+ lines - should be split into modules (auth, admin, payments, ai, etc.) per file-size guideline (>700 lines).
admin_list_users projection is fine but `country`/`currency`/`phone` are returned without redaction - acceptable for super admin only.
Lead PATCH endpoint correctly returns 400 for invalid status and 404 for unknown lead_id; no MongoDB _id leak observed (good).
test_credentials: Super admin session token seeded via mongosh (see /app/auth_testing.md). For this run: admin email=elliot.cohenpressard@trykolo.io with rotating session_token. Test users prefixed TEST_ for easy cleanup.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 admin user, 1 non-admin user (nonadmin.test@example.com), and 1 TEST_ enterprise_lead. Session-scoped pytest fixtures auto-clean test rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-seed an admin session: run the mongosh script in /app/auth_testing.md step 1. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_kolo_admin.py and reusable. Frontend smoke flow: localStorage.setItem('kolo_token', <token>) then visit /kolo-admin. Note: Google btn redirect target captured by reading page.url after click since Location.href cannot be redefined on instance.
rca of the issue: N/A - all Phase 1 features pass. Only cosmetic console warning in users table.
